title: Recall the orientation
text: The 200-cm end is at the floor. Toward the wall means toward lower cm values - wait, re-read: the stick has its 200-cm end at the floor, so toward the floor is toward higher numbers. Starting at $$100$$ cm, a net displacement of $$+32$$ cm toward the floor means... but our net was $$-32$$ cm (toward the wall). So final $$position=100-32=68$$ cm.
